symptoms: PR body: TestMemCount previously took ~807s and may cause timeout.
failure_signature: PR body: TestMemCount previously took ~807s and may cause timeout.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to timing-sensitive asynchronous behavior (background tasks/events not fully settled). This PR stabilizes it by: executor: accelerate TestMemCount.

evidence: evidence: PR body: TestMemCount previously took ~807s and may cause timeout.
evidence: refactors/accelerates mem-count related tests to avoid CI timeout flakiness (executor/aggfuncs/*_test.go).
